state.next-action: `12-02` now uses `/portal/ops/*` as the canonical staff route family while legacy `/ops/*` paths remain compatibility redirects. `/portal/ops/users` covers role-template assignment, Clerk invite send or reissue, pending-invite revoke, provider resync, and app-owned suspend or restore actions while preserving first-party staff roles and non-active status during Clerk reconciliation. `/portal/ops/customers` now covers set or clear primary customer, send or clear portal access for a linked user, and clear or repair Stripe linkage through `/api/internal/ops/customers/[id]`. Continue the phase by closing the remaining gaps: add a true stale-id Stripe resync path that can bypass or clear bad account-level customer ids, then decide whether explicit entitlement locks still need a first-party model beyond role-template and suspension controls.
